case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. CHI WONG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [CCP 1033] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, CHI $2,345.41 PRINCIPAL, $287.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,632.91, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED NOV-04-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, CHI
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, CHI DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-02-2012
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $287.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, CHI
